mapper.insert: INSERT INTO word_entries (session_id, user_id, phrase, example, memo, created_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{phrase}, #{example}, #{memo}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id AS sessionId, user_id AS userId, phrase, example, memo, created_at AS createdAt FROM word_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
